title: Grid Layout Node
description: Represents a complete grid layout node that extends the widget interface with additional element reference. This interface combines position, widget properties, and DOM element reference for comprehensive grid item management.

props.name: x
props.description: X position of the widget in the grid.

props.name: y
props.description: Y position of the widget in the grid.

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the widget in columns.

props.name: height
props.description: Height of the widget in rows.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Maximum width of the widget in columns.

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Maximum height of the widget in rows.

props.name: minWidth
props.description: Minimum width of the widget in columns.

props.name: minHeight
props.description: Minimum height of the widget in rows.

props.name: disableResize
props.description: Prevents direct resizing by the user.

props.name: disableDrag
props.description: Prevents direct moving by the user.

props.name: element
props.description: Reference to the DOM element associated with this grid node.
